O

occupies(Position) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.ship.Ship
 
occupyingShip - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Cell
 
onBackToMenuClicked() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
"Volver al inicio": reloads a completely fresh main screen, the simplest reliable way to reset every piece of state at once.
onCellClicked(MouseEvent) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
First click on a cell selects it (shows CombatController.targetMarker there) without firing; a second click on that SAME cell confirms and fires.
onCellClicked(MouseEvent) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
A click on a player-board water cell attempts to place the current ship there; anything else is ignored.
onCodeEntered - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.KonamiCodeDetector
 
onContinueClicked() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
HU-5: loads the saved game from disk and jumps straight into combat with it, skipping placement entirely.
onDrag(MouseEvent) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
 
onDragStart(MouseEvent) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
 
onFleetPlacementComplete() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.event.ShipPlacementAdapter
 
onFleetPlacementComplete() - Method in interface com.example.battleship.controller.event.ShipPlacementListener
Called once every ship in the fleet has been placed.
onGameOver(Player) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.event.CombatAdapter
 
onGameOver(Player) - Method in interface com.example.battleship.controller.event.CombatListener
Called once a player's whole fleet has been sunk.
onMouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
Moves the preview ghost to follow the mouse while it's over a player-board water cell, and clears it otherwise.
onMouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
Shows a white ring on whichever player-board water cell the mouse is currently over, hides it otherwise.
onNewGameClicked() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
"Nuevo Juego": validates the nickname field, then starts HU-1 (fleet placement) if it's non-blank.
onPlacementRejected(String) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.event.ShipPlacementAdapter
 
onPlacementRejected(String) - Method in interface com.example.battleship.controller.event.ShipPlacementListener
Called when an attempted placement was rejected (overlap, out of bounds, etc.) -- useful for showing feedback to the player.
onShipPlaced(Ship) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.event.BoardListenerAdapter
 
onShipPlaced(Ship) - Method in interface com.example.battleship.model.board.BoardListener
Called right after a ship has been successfully placed on the board.
onShipPlaced(Ship, Ship3D) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.event.ShipPlacementAdapter
 
onShipPlaced(Ship, Ship3D) - Method in interface com.example.battleship.controller.event.ShipPlacementListener
Called right after one ship has been successfully placed.
onShotResolved(Position, ShotResult, Ship) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController.HumanBoardListener
 
onShotResolved(Position, ShotResult, Ship) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController.MachineBoardListener
 
onShotResolved(Position, ShotResult, Ship) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.event.BoardListenerAdapter
 
onShotResolved(Position, ShotResult, Ship) - Method in interface com.example.battleship.model.board.BoardListener
Called right after a shot has been resolved.
onTurnChanged(Turn) - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.event.CombatAdapter
 
onTurnChanged(Turn) - Method in interface com.example.battleship.controller.event.CombatListener
Called whenever the turn passes from one player to the other.
OrbitCameraRig3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view
A free-roaming "dome" camera: the user can drag to orbit around a fixed target point at a constant radius -- geometrically, a point moving over the surface of a hemisphere centered on the target (the concept-sketch idea: pick a fixed radius from the target, and every point at that radius traces out the dome the camera is allowed to move on).
OrbitCameraRig3D(double, Point3D, double, double) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
 
orientation - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.ship.Ship
 
orientation - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
 
Orientation - Enum Class in com.example.battleship.model.ship
Orientation in which a ship can be laid out on the board.
Orientation() - Constructor for enum class com.example.battleship.model.ship.Orientation
 
origin - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.ship.Ship
 
ORTHOGONAL_OFFSETS - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
The four orthogonal directions a hit ship's next segment could be in.
orthogonalNeighborsInBounds(Position) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
 
OUTER_RADIUS - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.HoverMarker3D
 
OutOfBoardException - Exception in com.example.battleship.model.exception
Thrown when a requested row/column falls outside the board (0-9 for a 10x10 board), before a valid Position can even be built.
OutOfBoardException(int, int) - Constructor for exception com.example.battleship.model.exception.OutOfBoardException
 
overlapsExistingShip(Ship) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
 
ownBoard - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.player.Player
